General.Name: Daido Group Ltd
General.Description: Daido Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides cold storage and related services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Cold Storage and Related Services; and Trading and Sales of Food and Beverage segments. It provides warehouse storage and logistics services, including storage, freight, cargo delivery, towing, devanning and loading, packaging and re-packaging, and related value-added services, as well as management and consulting services. The company also engages in food and beverage trading and distribution, including import, export, distribution, re-distribution, and related value-added services; as well as container hauling and devanning, packaging, and logistics services. Daido Group Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tower 1, Admiralty Centre, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
